description: Maps durable harness installation IDs to operating roles. Harness IDs are defined by harness-state/harness-identities.json.

A.assigned_reason: Restore owner-directed current-harness PB+LO assignment after erroneous Antigravity handoff partition restore; Claude and Gemini unavailable

B.assigned_reason: Claude unavailable; current harness A carries PB+LO until further owner direction
